stratagem.name: MACHINE WRATH
stratagem.lore: In a last act of vengeance, the doomed crew of this burning transport drive into the midst of the enemy.
stratagem.when: Any phase, just after a Heavy Transport unit from your army is destroyed.
stratagem.target: That Heavy Transport unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before you roll for its Deadly Demise ability, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding Monsters and Vehicles ) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes, combined with their transhuman physiology, makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: RAPID EMBARKATION
stratagem.lore: With steely discipline, Space Marine battle‑brothers mount up swiftly, even as the enemy closes in.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly Heavy Transport it is able to embark within.
stratagem.effect: If your Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit is wholly within 6" of that Heavy Transport , it can embark within it.

stratagem.name: CERAMITE SLEDGEHAMMER
stratagem.lore: The mightiest Space Marine transports are unstoppable on the advance.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a Heavy Transport , when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding Monsters and Vehicles ) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagem.name: ADVANCED DEPLOYMENT
stratagem.lore: Coaxing the utmost from roaring engines, transport crews strive to deploy their passengers as close as possible to their assigned objectives.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your Transport has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.

stratagem.name: PURGATION DOCTRINE
stratagem.lore: Emerging from their transports, Space Marine infantry ruthlessly clear enemy positions.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll (if your unit disembarked from a Heavy Transport this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well).
